news.t: Vontobel Enters Active ETF Market With First Launch in the US

holdings.infoBox: VNIE is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 6.62%, Tokyo Electron at 5.96%, ASML Holding at 5.52%, Galderma Group AG at 5.23%, and TC Energy at 4.50%.

overview.description: The Vontobel International Equity Active ETF (VNIE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in non-US equities, including emerging markets, while aligning with global indices and meeting ESG standards. The fund aims for long-term capital growth VNIE was launched on May 14, 2025 and is issued by Vontobel.

data.title: Vontobel Enters Active ETF Market With First Launch in the US
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Over the past 10 years, active ETF assets under management have grown at a compound annual growth rate of 39%.1 Vontobel's entry into the active ETF market enables clients t...
